channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped wood needs removing, 18th April
item.description:
Derby Road east side Dumped wood needs removing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Derby Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish needs removal, 18th April
item.description:
Handley Road east and west sides near junction with Victoria Park Road. Dumped rubbish needs removing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and furniture dumped on Ash grove and richborough road, 18th April
item.description:
Rubbish and furniture dumped on Ash grove and richborough road please clean

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricklewood Broadway, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Foul smelling bag, 18th April
item.description:
Not sure what this is but the stench is awful from this bag and has been there a couple of days now. Please remove asap and disinfect the area. Kids were playing near by tonight, it's awful.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 180-182, Clevedon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The abodoned Jeep is hiding some much rubbish inc glass and the bin men can’t get in the bin to clean this up, 18th April
item.description:
So much rubbish being dumped mathyesses glass etc Bins can’t be opened due to keep having been there since Xmas

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deverell Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking parking bays, 18th April
item.description:
Pictures taken 18/04/2026 @ 06:56 - speaks for itself, total lack of consideration for other road users

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty road signs, 18th April
item.description:
All the road signs including the 30 mph speed limit sign and directions onto the A20 from just past the Tesco entrance need cleaning. They are extremely dirty and some are near unreadable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edgington Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge unattended for 9 months, 18th April
item.description:
This fridge had been here for 9 months. It seems to be outside a garage. It was here when we viewed our house in july and is still here now we have moved in. There is also litter spillage.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parkdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several dumped items, 18th April
item.description:
Multiple fly-tipped items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gladstone Mews, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Nearside southbound head facing 90° wrong way & damaged, 18th April
item.description:
St Pancras Way / Agar Grove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Randolph Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.description:

item.title: Rubbish dumped in bushes, 18th April
item.description:
Lots of rubbish has been dumped in the bushes, it has been like this for months and is getting worse and attracting rats.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Drive, Greater London

item.title: King mattress dumped by non residents, 18th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shottery Close, Mottingham, Greater London

item.description:
